title: Chapter 992 Summary
main_description: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
key_events: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
